subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! A letter hath been written to Shíráz, and a copy is enclosed herein for perusal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه ای بشیراز مرقوم گردید سوادش در جوف است ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @obedience to and respect for government authority
